programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food; he savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: There's not much more to miss than college football, parties, and the food; no matter the time, day or night, you can always find some of the best bites around to satisfy campus cravings.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: A day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and superstuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable; these aren't just everyday delicacies -- to make this list, foods have to be brimming with the biggest flavors.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: BBQ fried chicken; hot dog with 50 topping choices; apple pie smothered in caramel.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: Fruit-filled homemade breakfast pastry; peanut butter and jelly doughnuts; chocolate mousse; tangerine creamsicles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: Unexpected food combinations.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit-and-cream pie in Los Angeles; in New York, Anne Burrell dives into a mouthwatering pizza; Kristen Kish warms up with a one-of-a-kind chicken pot pie in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Andrew dines on cuisine from around the world; hedigs into a monster Mexican sandwich, samples some of New York's best Egyptian cuisine and feasts on Argentine meats and authentic Taiwanese fare.

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food; he savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: There's not much more to miss than college football, parties, and the food; no matter the time, day or night, you can always find some of the best bites around to satisfy campus cravings.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: A day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and superstuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable; these aren't just everyday delicacies -- to make this list, foods have to be brimming with the biggest flavors.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam eats cheddar in Cheddar before traveling to a farm café for roast chicken and a cheesy celeriac and leek bake, stopping at a vending machine for chocolate milk and tucking into a quiche from a mother-daughter bakery.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam travels to Melton Mowbray for a famous pork pie, some traditional sweets, a chicken curry at an award-winning restaurant and a mac and cheese doughnut from a village eatery.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah travels to Edmonton for s'mores mini donuts at K-Days; drops by the North Dakota State Fair and samples wild rice burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: At the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta, Noah samples a Korean twist on a French dip, a Diablo Dog, and the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack; the Henderson, Nev., St. Patrick's Day Festival has Blasted Irish Burgers and gold-infused Leprechaun Mac.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Washington County Fair in Utah for the Twisted Pickle Roll -- a deep-fried pickle sushi dream come true -- and has a little dessert in the desert with the Cookie Dough Dog. Then, he's off to the Clark County Fair in Nevada for Pretzel French Toast and the spicy Cheesy Carne Brick. Finally, Noah heads to the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for their Southern Fried Softshell Sandwich, the Fiery Fiesta Funnel Cake and Grape Gems, a candy-coated fruity treat!

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake; a Wurstburger and a chocolaty Black Forest Float at the Oktoberfest celebration known as Wurstfest.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Caliente curls; chile relleno dog; mac and cheese bacon burger; cowboy beans; the Sunnyside burger; tropical tantalizer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure; he samples creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvases the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking starts the meal off right with 15 of the best appetizers in the United States; from nachos and chicken wings to oysters, fries and more, Roger's going coast-to-coast to find the best.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: From traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers; learning everything there is to know about each cut of beef; some of the best beef-centric recipes in the country and all of their steer-crazy secrets.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Because great food calls for great entertainment, these places offer spectacles as well as incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programme.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the United States, from chicken wings and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and salmon tacos.

programme.desc: Diners ditch their home digs to catch the culinary excitement of day-trip dining, from a pound of perfect barbecue on a bun in Fort Worth, Texas, to a sofrito-slathered, super-sized burrito in Arlington, Va.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Unknown foods of Colombia; seafood in Cartagena; market workers in Cecilia; the island of Tierra Bomba; fried pig intestines and boiled pig ears.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony visits the city of Belém in Brazil; he immerses himself in the unexplored gastronomical treasures of the Amazon rainforest; he finds a prehistoric delicacy, the pirarucu.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to Cajun Country to dine with some locals and eat at a crawfish boil to see what sets the bayou apart from the mainland.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Roadtrip With G. Garvin
programme.desc: A visit to 610 Magnolia In Louisville, Ky., for slow-cooked oxtails; Hammerheads eclectic menu; Juanita's Burger Boy Diner, serves classic diner fare; The Rudyard Kipling, known for burgoo, a meat and veggie stew.

programme.title: Roadtrip With G. Garvin
programme.desc: A lesson on how to make goat cheese in Franklin, Tennessee; visiting a distillery in Bardstown, Kentucky, to learn about the bourbon process.

programme.title: Roadtrip With G. Garvin
programme.desc: G. Garvin heads back to his hometown of Atlanta; shrimp and grits; red velvet cake; fried chicken.

programme.title: Roadtrip With G. Garvin
programme.desc: The Original Farmer's Market; The Gumbo Pot; Fritzi Dog; Bennett's Ice Cream; The Serving Spoon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan discovers a variety of Austin food fare; migas tacos at a popular roadside stop; authentic Texas barbecue; a bayou experience right out of MawMaw's recipe book.

programme.title: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan tries fried chicken, biscuits, eggs and bacon for breakfast; sampling an Italian beef sandwich for lunch; trying a chocolate almond croissant; enjoying gourmet mac and cheese.

programme.desc: Ali Khan discovers more in Albuquerque than just the hype; he samples a vegan waffle, green chile cheeseburgers, a designer donut and carne adovada.

programme.title: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan visits Pittsburgh for some cheesy pancakes and takes on a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water; Ali discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels and ends the day at one of the city's hottest new spots.

programme.title: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: Ali visits Baltimore and comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes and has his first taste of Maryland pit beef; Ali snacks on Basque-style fried cheese balls before he tries some Korean-style street noodles.

programme.title: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan searches for the best deals in Philadelphia for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack; Ali starts with a local favorite: a scrapple, egg and cheese dip sandwich, then he hunts down roast pork with provolone and spinach for lunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: A slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce; a flaming hot burger stuffed with spicy jalapeno Jack cheese and covered in Buffalo sauce; a brewery's drunken chicken pot pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: A triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs; a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labor of love; classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew; classic favorites like pizza and PB&J into the city's best burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: Fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles; a burger with a house-made chorizo patty; smoked pulled pork with a Kansas City-style barbecue rub.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: Michael Symon chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece; pork buns in Columbus, Ohio; a roasted onion stuffed with smoked pork and brisket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, the City of Bridges; he tries dried, salty cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, and Port wine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew highlights Tuscan specialties like small-batch extra virgin olive oil, spicy fish stew served over crusty bread, chickpea pancakes and whole fish simmered quickly in spicy tomato sauce.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, discovering ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey, including all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs, and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew explores the iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada; there, the proximity to the sea, which is never more than 67 kilometers away, influences the local cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, delicious; the city's edible symbols take the form of pierogies, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Featuring french pastry shops in Los Angeles; the kouign-amann, a cake with pistachios and raspberries of Breton origin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: At Dominique Ansel Kitchen, desserts are made to order; at Good Batch, customers go wild for treats like the deconstructed candy bar called the Macaroon Ice Cream Sandwich; Snow Days provides desserts that bring out the kid in everyone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Callie's Hot Little Biscuit for a cinnamon biscuit; Brown's Court Bakery for a peanut butter and sriracha croissant; Sweet Lulu's Bakery on Wheels for cake in a jar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Featuring blueberry donuts and sweet potato ginger glazed donuts from Holy Donut; a kolache pastry with three kinds of berries and orange rolls from Kolache; carrot cake pancakes and fried chicken and waffle sandwiches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to use pressed and dried flowers in their spring party desserts; then they must make a flower fantasy cake that features a flower flavor such as hibiscus, jasmine and elderflower.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to invent their own spring delight featuring cookies, ice cream and fruit; they're assigned classic cookies to turn into spring desserts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the remaining bakers to make a fruity spring dessert in a skillet to enjoy around the campfire; each baker is assigned a wintry craft and tasked with creating a look-alike, spring-themed cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the remaining bakers to combine destination desserts with classic snacks; the bakers create a two-dessert landscape resembling a vacation in a national forest, amusement park, city or tropical beach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.sub-title: Spring Gardens: The Birds and the Bugs
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the final bakers to create spring songbird-themed desserts; to win the title and $25,000 prize, bakers must make a spring garden cake with a surprise design element inside.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
